name: Female Snow Leopard TF | (From CHANGED)
description:
Greetings to all who are suffering! As usual, I created this bot at night, so I apologize in advance for using AI. Although, to be fair, the AI ​​rather expanded on my original idea. Here's a nice picture for you to enjoy.)


And one more thing: Please subscribe to me, I really need it! I won't leave you without similar content and will continue to develop my skills without using AI as an additional tool for writing bots.


For all questions and suggestions, write to me on Discord (Lambda_The_Protogen) or in the comments on this page.
